text.message: yeah... this board for 4th is not it chief
omg i just found another OWS
to quote eric andre... nightmare nightmare mightmare
i see a decent way to play it for u
buy my course for only 99.99 and find out right away
chose between brick and ore eh
but red starts with a wood brick and beats me to the 3-1 for sure
i thought u go 10-3-11 for sure
i dont like the expansions after that
but i guess blues got it good, i prob shoulda build road left
i mean, you are kind of banking on 3s at this point lol
not gonna solo blue there lol
my gameplan is rough man idk if i win this
even tho i have city, reds got a much much better build
black rob my wheat i don't make
red actually has highest wood and brick and wheat and sheep in the game lol
shocker, but im the only one who cant win this one
i just did sm work slowing down red and im getting soloed
blue is a bigger threat than red at this point
well thats bc i slowed him down
no wood no port no wheat
you will have road in the end blue
is not like I can take it on command
but before this game ends, you will have it
blue has best OWS red has no ore, so it's close
i dont think its super clear cut
its orange, then blue, then red, then me
like u said im banking on some 3 sheep
robbing me on 1 card vs orange on 10 with locked army and 2 down devs
why can't u take road mr doubled 3 and doubled 6
otherwise im trading like a mad man
if I have to do that I lose anyway
but keep robbing me while orange prints cities and devs
yo black, so army + 4 is 6, i would need 4 vps
you are the one that threw a hissy fit over 1 rob
nooo... u started table talking me for no reason
that is just rewriting what happen
even though im not the one that even robbed you XD
We need to stop the devs
guys like i said, the only way i win realistically is 4 vps
i aint getting that with all this OWS competition
i wouldnt be surprised if u guys are already holding 2-3 of them
with what brick and sheep and wood
if you dont get another settle
there are yops in the deck
im raw sitting on ore and wheat so it seems like im ahead bc of early cities, but this strat is bad long term
i think red could be 2 roads from 9 actually
i have 0 road contest whilst you guys can fight for it
yet here you rob me evry time
black already has 6 without any army, no vps, no road
funny you mention that orange, bc i will never have road or armyt
you have the best build right now i think to make roads
city on wheats are basically wood, and you are on 6 brick
im legit about to lose army to blue
wild how anyone in this game actually thinks i have a sliver of a chance to win
blue pops at 8, has vp 9, makes settle gg
oh man imagine red has 2 vps
i just extending the rest of the game
hes thinking about a mono or something
the lack of game sense on all fronts is crazy
ohhh snap what did i say
its funny bc if red has 2 vp, he can take road but also potentially win, we're cooked black
and u guys were robbing me
i have road builder so luckily they can't i think
i didnt get wheat for 3 orbits i think
gotta love blue trying to play off having road lockeed this game
genuinely cant believe blue is the road guy
i had to have road builder
he is on brick but you have better wood production
and u can still get it
and i cant connect my roads like blue can
your road isnt dependent on 2 and 3
your road is dependent on 6 brick and you converting wheat
you have the technically best machine to make roads
anyways i don't get why yall rob me not ret but whatever, they just need road-settle I need city + settle
so idk how on paper you lose the road war unless u wanted to
you will know why i dont have road
blue got 6 knights in a row
i have 7 knights how are you unlucky
blue you 100% secure army now, no one takes army from u
i got dead devs during a race
so can black, but I am out so don't care
all u guys one orbit away from winning lmao
you have to be fkn joking
